decision.summary: Hold the near-certain 69k No position and do not open any new BTC position.
decision.rationale: The existing open position, No on 'Will Bitcoin reach $69,000 on March 27?', is already at 99.95% with BTC spot at 66383.39, so it is in the take-profit zone; under the playbook exception, it can be held to resolve naturally because the outcome is near-certain. Beecthor’s latest thesis remains bearish overall but still allows a tactical rebound, with 65k as the decisive support and 62.7k/59k below if it fails. For new trades, nearest-strike-first points to the March 28 $66k dip market, but at 74% Yes the move is already too close to target and too aggressively priced; the next bearish strike, $65k dip, is only 24% Yes and below the 50% minimum. Upside reach markets are also below the minimum or conflict with the broader bearish thesis.
